rationale: Review 1 catches a real, diff-confirmable naming inconsistency — Prop classes AffineAlgGroup/ReductiveGroup/SemisimpleGroup lack the Is-prefix that the same file's IsUnipotent and standard Mathlib (IsNoetherian, IsReduced) use — plus the overstated `: True` field name; Review 2 approves and misses all of these, so acting on Review 1 produces the better PR.
